Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start do 'verificaOperacoes' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPAGAMENTOFOLHAS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &IsTodosMarcados = true &FPagAno = Year(ServerDate()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ActionGroup1Data = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Monitora Diárias' &ActionGroup1DataItem.Link = wwPagamentoDiarias.Link() &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Imprimir Folhas' &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'ImprimirDiarias' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = '------------' &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'espaco1' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Gerar Lançamentos Automáticos' &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'UserGravarAutomatico' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = '------------' &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'espaco2' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Exportar Excel' &ActionGroup1DataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Exportar PDF' &ActionGroup1DataItem.Icon = ActionExportReport.Link() &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'ExportReport' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &FPagMes = nullvalue(&FPagMes) &FPagTip = nullvalue(&FPagTip) &FPagSts = nullvalue(&FPagSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Pagamento Folha' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount FPagSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &SelFol.Visible = 0 Do CAse CAse (FPagFunSalTip = 'D') FPagPesCod.TooltipText = 'DIARISTA' FPagPesCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,50,255) CAse (FPagFunSalTip = 'M') FPagPesCod.TooltipText = 'MENSALISTA' FPagPesCod.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) otherwise prcAtualizaMensalista.Call(EmpCod, FPagPesCod) FPagPesCod.TooltipText = 'MENSALISTA' FPagPesCod.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) EndCAse /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &UserEliminar = !'' If (FPagSts = 'A') &UserEliminar.Class = !'Attribute' Else &UserEliminar.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &UserUpdate = !'' &FecharAbrir = !'' If (FPagSts <> Status_Folha.Pago) &FecharAbrir.Class = !'Attribute' Else &FecharAbrir.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &ImprimirFolha = !'' Do Case Case FPagSts = Status_Folha.Aberto FPagSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case FPagSts = Status_Folha.Pago FPagSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case FPagSts = Status_Folha.PagoParcial FPagSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise FPagSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &SelFol = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) Endif If (FPagSts = Status_Folha.Aberto) &UserUpdate.Class = !'Attribute' Else &UserUpdate = !'' Endif If FPagLibPgt = true &FecharAbrir.Visible = true &ActionSelecione.visible = 0 Else &FecharAbrir.Visible = false &ActionSelecione.Visible = 1 EndIf FPagPesRaz.Link = VerCliente.Link('WWPagamentoFolhas', EmpCod, FPagPesCod) EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &UserEliminar.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &FPagCod_Selected = FPagCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_UserEliminar.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_UserEliminar.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_UserEliminar.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do UserEliminar' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &FecharAbrir.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ FecharAbrir_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event FecharAbrir_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WPPgtoPagamentoFolha.Create(EmpCod, FPagCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event FecharAbrir_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DouserInsert' wpAddFolha.Link(&Context.EmpCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserMarcar' If &IsTodosMarcados = True BtnUserMarcar.Caption = 'Desmarcar' BtnUserMarcar.Tooltiptext = 'Desmarcar' &IsTodosMarcados = false Else BtnUserMarcar.Caption = 'Marcar' BtnUserMarcar.Tooltiptext = 'Marcar' &IsTodosMarcados = true EndIf If &IsTodosMarcados = False For Each Line &selFol = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) EndFor Else For Each Line &selFol = false &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) EndFor EndIf Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserLiberar' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WPLIBERARFOLHA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &LiberarFolhaAutNiv) if &LiberarFolhaAutNiv > 0 &Count = 0 &CoutFolhaErro = 0 &IsUmaSelecionada = false For Each Line If &selFol = true &IsUmaSelecionada = true if FPagIsErro = true &CoutFolhaErro += 1 Else If FPagSts = status_Folha.Aberto and FPagLibPgt = false LiberaPgtoGrupo_novo.Call(EmpCod,FPagCod,&IsOk,&Mensagem) if &IsOk = true &Count += 1 else msg(&Mensagem) EndIf &selFol = false EndIf Endif Endif EndFor Do Case CAse &Count = 0 msg('Nenhuma Folha está marcada para liberar Pagamento') Case &Count > 0 msg('Foram liberadas: ' + &Count.ToString() + ' Folhas para Pagamento.') EndCase if &CoutFolhaErro > 0 msg('Folhas com erros não liberadas: ' + &CoutFolhaErro.ToString()) Endif &selFol = false Refresh BtnUserMarcar.Caption = 'Marcar' BtnUserMarcar.Tooltiptext = 'Marcar' &IsTodosMarcados = true Else msg('Não autorizado: "WPLIBERARFOLHA" Liberação DE FOLHAS/DIARIAS para Pagamento!') Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserBaixar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserBaixar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserBaixar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpPagamentoDiarias.Create('F') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserBaixar_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_ActionGroup1.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'ImprimirDiarias' Do 'Do ImprimirDiarias' Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'espaco1' Do 'Do espaco1' Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'UserGravarAutomatico' Do 'Do UserGravarAutomatico' Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'espaco2' Do 'Do espaco2' Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'ExportReport' Do 'DoExportReport' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserGravarAutomatico_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WpFechamentoFolha.Create() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserGravarAutomatico_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &FPagPesRaz1.Visible = False &FPagPesCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESCOD' &FPagPesCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &FPagPesRaz2.Visible = False &FPagPesCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FPAGPESCOD' &FPagPesCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &FPagPesRaz3.Visible = False &FPagPesCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FPAGPESCOD' &FPagPesCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserEliminar' if &AutNiv < 3 msg('Não autorizado: "WWPAGAMENTOFOLHAS" Nivel 3 - excluir') Else prcDeletarPagamentoFolha.Call(&EmpCod_Selected,&FPagCod_Selected) grid.Refresh() Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImprimirDiarias' wpimpressaofolha.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do espaco1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserGravarAutomatico' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserGravarAutomatico_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do espaco2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGANO" &FPagAno.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGMES" &FPagMes.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGTIP" &FPagTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGFUNFILCOD" &FPagFunFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGSTS" &FPagSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESCOD' &FPagPesCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FPAGANO", "", not &FPagAno.IsEmpty(), 0, &FPagAno.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FPAGMES", "", not &FPagMes.IsEmpty(), 0, &FPagMes.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FPAGTIP", "", not &FPagTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &FPagTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FPAGFUNFILCOD", "", not &FPagFunFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FPagFunFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FPAGSTS", "", not &FPagSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &FPagSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' AND not &FPagPesRaz1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FPagPesRaz1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESCOD' AND not &FPagPesCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FPagPesCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' AND not &FPagPesRaz2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FPagPesRaz2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FPAGPESCOD' AND not &FPagPesCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FPagPesCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' AND not &FPagPesRaz3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FPagPesRaz3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FPAGPESCOD' AND not &FPagPesCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FPagPesCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"PagamentoFolha" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwPagamentoFolhas.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwwPagamentoFolhas.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &UserUpdate.Click wpAddFolha.Link(EmpCod, FPagCod) EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione.Click if &SelFol = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &SelFol = false Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &SelFol = true Endif EndEvent Event &ImprimirFolha.Click &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &PesCod = FPagPesCod &FolhaPgto.Clear() &FolhaPgtoItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &FolhaPgtoItem.FPagCod = FPagCod &FolhaPgtoItem.FolFunCod = FPagPesCod &FolhaPgtoItem.FolMes = FPagMes &FolhaPgtoItem.FolAno = FPagAno &FolhaPgto.Add(&FolhaPgtoItem) &WebSession.Set('FolhaPagamento',&FolhaPgto.ToXml()) &randon = serverNow() Do 'ValidaImpressao' If &PesSalTotRec > 0 RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS051_FolhaPagamento.Link(&IsSintetico,&randon) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) else Msg('Funcionário sem salário cadastrado! Favor cadastrar em CADASTRO > PESSOAS > CADASTRO DE FUNCIONÁRIOS na opção "o que fazer"') EndIf EndEvent Sub 'verificaOperacoes' LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) For Each ORder EmpCod, LcfCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where LcfVlrPad.IsEmpty() or LcfVlrPad.IsNull() insertRotinaAtualizarOperacoesFolha.Call(EmpCod, Status_Simnao.Nao) exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'ValidaImpressao' For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod_Selected Where PesCod = &PesCod &PesSalTotRec = PesSalTotRec exit Endfor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
